title: Cell Viability Protocol using CellTiter-Glo 3D
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"71e1k","text":"This protocol provides a viability measurement for 3D culture.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"ekubr","text":"ATP (Mw = 551.14 g/mol) (A7699-1G, Sigma-Aldrich)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"27rvh","text":"spheroids","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"dtt4p","text":"Incomplete DMEM/F-12 culture medium without FBS (1%L-Glutamine, 1% Penicillin/Streptomycin) (Gibco 21331-020)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3g4tf","text":"CellTiter-Glo‱ 3D Cell Viability Assay (Promega G968A)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":13,"length":1}],"data":{}},{"key":"ajdjo","text":"Aluminium","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"2npdf","text":"Shaker","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"8glas","text":"Opaque 96-well plate for reading (Costar 96 Flat Bottom White Polystyrene)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"58rol","text":"Luminescence reader (Tecan Infinite M Plex)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"emoji","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"C1CF044E0BB411F0973E0A58A9FEAC02","name":":registered:"}}}}
steps: ● Thaw the CellTiter-Glo reagent in thefridge at 4°C the day before the experiment.
● Before use, let the kit reach roomtemperature for 30 minutes.
● Transfer the ATP solutions into theopaque 96-well plate for luminescence
● Transfer the spheroids from theincubation plate to the opaque 96-well plate for reading.
● Place the plate on the 28-magnetplate (Plate Holding) and aspirate the medium.
● Add 50 µL of DMEM without FBS perwell.
● Add 50 µL of CellTiter-Glo per well(into wells containing 50 µL of DMEM without FBS).
● Cover the plate with aluminum foil toprotect the samples from light, as CellTiter-Glo is light-sensitive.
● Incubate the plate at room temperaturefor 25 minutes.
● During this incubation period, shakethe plate on a vortex for 5 minutes at 2 rpm.
● Setup the device: ○ Shakingmode: Orbital shaking ○ Shakingtime: 3 s ○ Attenuation:None ○ Integrationtime: 1000 ms ○ Settletime: 0 ms ○ Temperature:22°C
● Place the plate without the lid onthe reader platform and position the plate.
● Start the reading and save the Excelfile.
creator: magali perier
